finding_results.notes: The reveal now gives Owen one concrete read on amendment magic as condition-level permission work, frames the sphere as a planetary-scale concealment problem, and keeps the largest inference unresolved by leaving open what exactly the Meridian Commonwealth hid.

The reading sequence now keeps the crawlspace active on the page through Owen's posture, cramping, burn surges, failing wandlight, and renewed curfew threat instead of running as uninterrupted abstract interpretation.

Recast the cited negation-definition beats at the kitchen handoff, lead-box reveal, manuscript reveal, and First Art explanation into action- or image-led sentences. Kept only the closing charm-versus-permission pivot as the single emphatic recurrence in the targeted cluster.
finding_results.summary: The repeated 'not X, but Y' prose tic has been reduced from the cited cluster so the chapter no longer leans on the same sentence shape for each revelation beat.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised the Grinlow Leaves discovery so the chapter keeps bodily and tactical pressure inside the reveal, lands amendment magic as permission-level work, and leaves the planetary concealment inference explicitly provisional.

Revised chapter 02 for the prose/copyedit pass by removing repeated negation-definition pivots across the flagged reveal beats while preserving Owen's pressure, the chapter's clandestine rhythm, and the closing permission motif.
